meaning: 纽埃岛[南太平洋中部](在汤加群岛以东,属新西兰)
examples: The capital of Niue, on the western coast of the island. Population, 590.
Niue, a remote Polynesian state of only 1, 400 people, is producing a set of 40 COINS.
The Cook Islands, Kiribati, Niue, Tonga, the Solomon Islands, Fiji and Vanuatu could also all be at risk.
There are two others in the Caribbean (St Kitts-Nevis and St Vincent) and four in the Pacific (Niue, Nauru and the Cook and Marshall Islands), as well as Panama and Liechtenstein.
